name: THE WALLWAY
short_description: The Wallway is a 1-5 player co-op horror game. Drill into endless subterranean tunnels, collect valuable artifacts, and fight to escape. But beware - monsters hunt by sound through your microphone. Will you escape the darkness, or be consumed by fear?
detailed_description:
WARNING: This game contains flashing lights, loud sounds, and lots of jumpscares.

Description

The Wallway is a cooperative first-person horror game for 1-5 players. Drill your way into endless subterranean tunnels, collect valuable artifacts, and fight your way out of the depths. Run from terrible monsters that hear your every sound through the microphone. Can you escape, or will you be consumed by darkness and fear?

What Is Your Challenge?

The Wallway plunges you into ancient catacombs teeming with precious artifacts. Your mission is to breach these dark depths with your drill, gather as much valuable loot as possible, and survive the hordes of undead and monsters trying to kill you. But beware – the catacombs hold secrets that can only be unlocked with special items. These will lead you to hidden chambers, housing the rarest treasures and the dark truth behind The Wallway.

Can You Do It?

  • Simple Playability
    The Wallway features intuitive controls that will get you into the action instantly. All game mechanics are clearly explained.

  • Online Co-op for 1-5 Players
    Play alone or team up with friends. A squad of up to five can explore the catacombs together, collect artifacts, and face the dangers lurking in the darkness.

  • High Replayability
    The full version of The Wallway offers a wide array of maps, game modes, and random events, ensuring no two playthroughs are the same. The fear and tension will stick with you even after dozens of hours.

  • Economy & Upgrades
    Sell your collected artifacts and use the profits to purchase powerful upgrades—enhance your drill, gear, and weapons to delve deeper and survive what awaits in the dark.

  • Deep Lore & Secrets
    The catacombs hold more than just treasure. Use special items to unlock hidden locations, revealing a story full of mysteries and terrifying revelations. Uncover the truth of The Wallway, if you dare.

  • Proximity Voice Chat & Realistic Fear
    Use voice chat that reacts to the distance between players. But be careful—the monsters can hear you too, and they will come for you!

Multiplayer

In addition to the single-player mode, The Wallway also offers multiplayer for up to 5 players. In some situations, you'll have to work together to survive this nightmare and escape the catacombs alive. Drill your way to riches together, or perish together in the dark.
